OnboardingAndAuthentication // social login Sign in with Google Sign in with Apple // permission request How you’ll use this To record videos or audio within the app. Privacy We don’t record without your direction action within a feature. Allow bloom to access your camera and microphone Your Control You can manage these permissions anytime in your device settings. //Segmented Button labels
@string/sign_in
@string/sign_up
//Checkbox with terms and conditions label I agree to Terms and Conditions // text buttons Already have an account? Log In Forgot Password? Reset Password Not now I’m not a robot // welcome screen "Grow Your Inner Peace." Illustration of a woman meditating surrounded by greenery Green logo titled “bloom” //Two factor authentication screen Verify Your Login We’ve sent a one-time 6-digit code to your phone number ending in XX-XX Enter Verification Code Didn’t get the code? Resend in %1$s:%2$s The password you entered does not match our records. // Account Verification Screen Navigate back Recaptcha Verify Your Email We’ve sent a 6-digit verification code to your email at jdoe@gmail.com Verify Email Please enter a valid verification code"> // Social login screen Welcome back to bloom Ready to find your calm again? Email Please enter a valid email address. Password The password you entered does not match our records. // Profile Screen Welcome to bloom Let’s personalize your experience. Your Name Enter a short bio (Optional) What brings you to mindfulness? I would like daily mindfulness reminders Ready to find your calm again?"> Please enter a valid email address."> //Terms and conditions Terms & Conditions Last updated 15 April 2025 1. Agreement to Terms 2. Use of the Service 3. Updates Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using bloom mobile application. By accessing or using our app (bloom), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service.
Eligibility: You represent and warrant that you are at least [age] years old and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.
Account Registration (if applicable): If you create an account, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process.
Acceptable Use: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of, restrict, or inhibit anyone else\'s use and enjoyment of the Service. Prohibited conduct includes, but is not limited to:
Violating any applicable laws or regulations.
Infringing upon the intellectual property rights of others.
Transmitting any harmful, offensive, or illegal content.
Interfering with or disrupting the operation of the Service.
Attempting to gain unauthorized access to the Service or related systems.
Because our app is always improving and sometimes the law changes, we might need to update these Terms of Service from time to time.
How we will let you know: We will do our best to keep you informed about any significant changes. This might include showing a notification within the app, sending an email to the address associated with your account (if applicable), posting a notice on our website, etc.
Your Responsibility: It\'s a good idea to check these Terms periodically for any updates. By continuing to use bloom after we have made changes, you are agreeing to the new Terms. If you don\'st agree with the updated Terms, you may need to stop using the app.
If you have any questions about our Terms or any updates, please don\'t hesitate to contact us through our support channels.
Accept //Signup Ready to find your calm? Create an account to access guided meditations, mindful exercises and more. Contact Details Phone Number Address MM/DD/YYYY Personal Details Date of birth Confirm Password The password you have entered does not match. Account Information I agree to the // sign up screen Date of Birth Cancel OK // WalkThrough Screen Find your Inner Calm with bloom Daily reminders to take a moment to unwind Navigate forward Select Date Clear Error Settings Edit
